user.title: Tuya Direct Setup
user.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials and connection type

Cloud reads the Tuya DP model and status from the internet. Local uses TinyTuya for faster updates after setup.

local.title: Local Device Setup
local.description:
Enter local device details

The device must be on the same local network as Home Assistant.

cloud_options.title: Cloud Configuration
cloud_options.description:
Configure the refresh interval

Lower values update faster but use more Tuya API calls.

cloud_options.title: Cloud Device Settings
cloud_options.description:
Configure the refresh interval

Lower values update faster but use more Tuya API calls.

local_options.title: Local Device Settings
local_options.description:
Update local device connection details

The device must be on the same local network.
